codes.definition: User manually checks output the agent reported as done.

examples.quote: I couldn't tell what the agent had changed, so I opened every file to check.
it said it was done but I didn't trust that until I ran the tests myself.

codes.definition: User abandons the agent and does the task by hand.

examples.quote: I gave up waiting and just wrote the function by hand.
honestly I ended up babysitting it the whole time.

codebook_statistics.saturation_indicator: high (no new codes in last transcript)
